java.name: Java Implementation

snippets.snippet_1: Safety Protocol: The cooling system must activate (coolant = true) only if the core_temp reaches or exceeds 90.
snippets.snippet_2: Security Override: The room_321_door should remain LOCKED unless the access_code provided is exactly 7734.
snippets.snippet_3: Power Management: Emergency backup_power must be ON if the main_grid is OFF AND the battery_level is below 20.

java.name: Java Implementation

snippets.snippet_1: Gateway Override: The gateway will only open if the incoming ip_address is exactly "192.168.1.1"
snippets.snippet_2: Packet Filter: Packet should be dropped if port is 80 and protocol is UDP
snippets.snippet_3: SSL Handshake: Only create connection when the cert expiration date is over 2026

java.name: Java Implementation

snippets.snippet_1: Output Sanitization: If the ai_response_string is a "CRITICAL ERROR", the output must be set to "CONTAINED".
snippets.snippet_2: Field Logic: The containment_field must be set to "ACTIVE" if the core_stability drops below 0.2 AND the core_temperature is over 500 degrees.
snippets.snippet_3: Advanced Protocol: Access is granted (access_granted = true) only if the provided encryption_type is exactly "RSA" OR exactly "AES".

java.name: Java Implementation

snippets.snippet_1: Atmospheric Safety: If the co2_level exceeds 0.05, the carbon scrubbers must be set to "MAX".
snippets.snippet_2: Thermal regulation: The heater should be on when the ambient temp is lower than 18
snippets.snippet_3: Maintenance Cycle: The filter must flush (true) only if the pressure (psi) is 60 or higher AND turbidity is above 5.

java.name: Java Implementation

snippets.snippet_1: Intruder Alert: Sound the alarm only if motion_detected is true AND the target is NOT authorized.
snippets.snippet_2: Targeting System: The target_lock should engage if the distance is 500 or less and visibility is "CLEAR".
snippets.snippet_3: Biometric Override: If the admin key is exactly 99, the gate bypass should be activated.
